Class HFFAssetPackGenerator

java.lang.Object
lucis.lux.hff.data.HFFAssetPackGenerator
public class HFFAssetPackGenerator extends Object
The HFFAssetPackGenerator class is responsible for generating asset packs for the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin. This class scans JAR and ZIP files in specified directories for asset files, processes them, and generates a new asset pack that is compatible with Hytale. It also registers firearm and ammunition data in the respective registries.

This class performs the following tasks:

  • Creates a new ZIP file system for the output asset pack.
  • Scans specified directories for JAR and ZIP files containing assets.
  • Processes each asset file, removing HFF-specific fields to ensure compatibility with Hytale.
  • Copies asset files (models, textures, icons, projectile configs) into the new asset pack.
  • Registers firearm and ammunition data in the FirearmRegistry and AmmoRegistry.

This class is typically used at runtime to generate asset packs from mod files.

    generateAssetPack(String outputPackPath, String modsDir)

    • HFFAssetPackGenerator

      public HFFAssetPackGenerator()

  • Method Details

    • generateAssetPack

      public static void generateAssetPack(String outputPackPath, String modsDir)
      Generates an asset pack by scanning the specified directories for JAR and ZIP files containing assets. The generated asset pack is saved to the specified output path.
      Parameters:
      outputPackPath - The path where the generated asset pack will be saved.
      modsDir - The directory to scan for JAT and ZIP files containing assets.
